label: Model Feedback (Formulation)
description: Feed wetlab formulation results back into the Formulation AI model to refine future composition predictions.

defaultInputs.name: Wetlab Formulation Data
defaultInputs.tooltip: Measured formulation test results from wetlab validation.

defaultOutputs.name: Model Name
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Name of the updated formulation model.

defaultOutputs.name: New Training Samples
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Number of new formulation data points added.

defaultOutputs.name: Improvement (%)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Percentage improvement in formulation prediction accuracy.

configSchema.label: Model to Retrain
configSchema.tooltip: The formulation composition model to update with wetlab-validated data.

configSchema.label: Retrain Strategy
configSchema.tooltip: Fine-tuning adds new samples incrementally; full retrain rebuilds from all data.
